settings.heading: What are Workwear Revolution women's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Workwear Revolution women's scrubs are a line of professional healthcare uniforms built for nurses, LPNs, medical assistants, and other healthcare professionals who need comfort, durability, and polished style through long shifts. Revolution is one of Cherokee's bestselling lines — designed to deliver trusted quality at exceptional value for the whole team. The women's line covers a wide range of styles: scrub tops including V-neck, mock wrap, tuck-in, snap front, polo, and knit panel cuts; scrub pants in jogger, tapered leg, cargo, pull-on, flare, and mid rise jogger silhouettes; and scrub jackets. Maternity tops and maternity pants are also available in the line, and sizes run from XXS to 6XL.

settings.heading: What fabric are Workwear Revolution women's scrubs made from?
settings.content: Cherokee Workwear Revolution women's scrubs are made from a blend of polyester, rayon, and spandex twill. The fabric delivers a soft, cloud-like feel with two-way stretch for freedom of movement throughout your shift. Several styles feature contrast mesh panels, which add breathability and a sporty look. Select styles also include reflective accents.

settings.heading: What sizes do Workwear Revolution women's scrubs come in?
settings.content: Cherokee Workwear Revolution women's scrubs are available from XXS to 6XL, making this one of the most size-inclusive lines Cherokee offers — so more healthcare professionals can find their ideal fit. The line also includes maternity scrub styles — a maternity side zip scrub top and a maternity scrub pant — designed to fit and support you through pregnancy while meeting the demands of a clinical setting.

settings.heading: How many pockets do Workwear Revolution women's scrubs have?
settings.content: Pocket count varies by style across the Revolution women's line. The Women's V-Neck Stretch Scrub Top has 3 pockets. The Women's Sweetheart V-Neck Scrub Top has 2 pockets. For pants, the Women's Elastic Waistband Cargo Pull-On Scrub Pant features extra storage pockets and a utility-inspired design. The Women's 12-Pocket Scrub Pant is the highest-pocket option in the line, with 12 pockets total — built for professionals who need dedicated storage for every tool on the floor.

settings.heading: Who are Workwear Revolution women's scrubs designed for?
settings.content: Cherokee Workwear Revolution women's scrubs are built for nurses, LPNs, RNs, medical assistants, CNAs, and other healthcare professionals who work in hospitals, clinics, dental offices, and veterinary settings. The line is designed to outfit individuals and entire teams — available in a broad range of sizes, colors, and styles so everyone on the floor can find the right fit. With inclusive sizing from XXS to 6XL and maternity options available, Revolution is built to work for every body, every shift.

settings.heading: How do I care for Workwear Revolution women's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Workwear Revolution scrubs feature easy-care convenience. The polyester, rayon, and spandex twill blend is designed to hold up through regular laundering. For specific wash instructions, refer to the care label on your garment, as care directions may vary by style.
